title: Belgium Vehicle Registration Application (DIV / Federal Public Service Mobility and Transport)
description: The Federal Public Service Mobility and Transport's (SPF Mobilité et Transports, publicly branded "mobilit.belgium.be") Vehicle Registration Directorate (Direction pour l'Immatriculation des Véhicules, DIV) "Demande d'immatriculation d'un véhicule" — the pink vehicle-registration request form used, per the authority's own site, for registering cars, vans, heavy commercial vehicles, motorcycles, mopeds, trailers, and caravans alike under a single federal form, sidestepping Belgium's regional (Flemish/Walloon/Brussels-Capital) fragmentation of other DMV-adjacent processes. Fetched directly and unauthenticated as a static, watermarked "SPECIMEN" PDF from mobilit.belgium.be. Advances Belgium's DMV vertical, previously banked as open, STRONG backlog by GOV-4638 ("GovSchema Standard Research") alongside Visa, once Belgium opened as the registry's 95th jurisdiction via Passport (GOV-4645). This edition is the French-language specimen; the same form is also published in parallel, functionally identical Dutch- and German-language editions. Models the applicant-facing registration-type, vehicle-data, and applicant-identity sections of this single-page, densely coded form; excludes the vehicle-inspection-station reservation frame and the insurer's own block, both of which are completed by parties other than the applicant. This schema does not submit the application itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Belgium or its Federal Public Service Mobility and Transport.

authority.name: Federal Public Service Mobility and Transport (Service public fédéral Mobilité et Transports), Vehicle Registration Directorate (Direction pour l'Immatriculation des Véhicules)

source.documentRef: Demande d'immatriculation d'un véhicule (DIV registration-request form, French "recto"/front-side specimen), 2023 edition, 1 page.

verification.notes: See VERIFICATION.md for the full write-up: source fetch/hash, the coded-field-label extraction method (glyph x/y position clustering, since the printed field codes such as C9/C1.1/X7 do not always sit adjacent to their own labels in a single reading order), node-canvas visual confirmation of the checkbox/grid layout, disclosed exclusions (inspection-station frame, insurer block), and every scoping/judgment call.

steps.title: Additional Declarations, Proxy, Delivery Address, and Express Delivery
Moped-Specific Frame and Special Plate Type

fields.name: plateAlreadyAvailable
fields.label: Plate Already Available
fields.description: Whether the applicant already holds a physical plate to reuse, printed immediately beside the registration-category checkboxes.

fields.name: vehicleCondition
fields.label: Vehicle Condition
fields.sourceRef: Code X2 — "cocher UNE case": ☐ Véhicule NEUF ☐ Véhicule USAGE

fields.name: plateFormat
fields.label: Plate Format
fields.sourceRef: Code X3 — "cocher UNE case": ☐ Plaque normale (52x11 cm) ☐ Format carré (34x21 cm) ☐ Format moto (21x14 cm) ☐ Format cyclo (10x12 cm)

fields.name: chassisCode
fields.label: Chassis Code
fields.description: A short type-approval code accompanying the chassis number, transcribed from the vehicle's own Certificate of Conformity or prior registration certificate.

fields.name: category
fields.label: Vehicle Category
fields.description: EU vehicle-category code (e.g. M1, N1, L1e), transcribed from the vehicle's own documentation.

fields.name: curbMass
fields.label: Curb Mass, kg ("en ordre de marche")

fields.name: importedFromCountry
fields.label: Imported From (Country)
fields.description: Only completed if applicable, per the form's own "cocher si applicable" (check if applicable) instruction.

fields.name: firstRegistrationDate
fields.label: Date of First Registration
fields.description: For a moped, the form's own footnote directs the applicant to enter the presumed date of first use if the exact date is unknown.
fields.sourceRef: Code B — "Date 1ère mise en circulation(*)" / footnote "(*) Pour cyclomoteur date présumée de 1ère mise en circulation"

fields.name: engineDisplacement
fields.label: Engine Displacement, cc
fields.description: Not applicable to purely electric vehicles.

fields.name: powerToWeightRatio
fields.label: Power-to-Weight Ratio, kW/kg
fields.description: Printed under a "Motocyclette" (Motorcycle) sub-heading — applicable to motorcycle registrations only.

fields.name: applicantType
fields.label: Applicant Type
fields.description: Inferred from this form's own two-column layout under "Le DEMANDEUR de l'immatriculation" — a "Personne morale" (legal entity) column of company-identification fields printed beside a "Personne physique" (natural person) column, rather than a single explicit checkbox pair; see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: For a natural person, the surname per their identity card; for a legal entity, the registered name per the Crossroads Bank for Enterprises (Banque Carrefour des Entreprises).
fields.sourceRef: Code C1.1 — "Nom (suivant carte d'identité ou Banque Carrefour des Entreprises)"

fields.name: vatOrCompanyNumber
fields.label: VAT or Company (Enterprise) Number
fields.sourceRef: Code C9 — "N° TVA ou N° d'entreprise"

fields.name: establishmentUnitNumber
fields.label: Establishment Unit Number
fields.description: A supplementary Crossroads Bank for Enterprises branch/unit identifier, not required on its own even for a legal-entity applicant.

fields.name: municipality
fields.label: Municipality
fields.description: The form's own label notes this includes municipalities within the Brussels-Capital Region ("y compris pour la région de Bruxelles").
fields.sourceRef: "Commune (dénomination officielle, y compris pour la région de Bruxelles)"

fields.name: contactPhoneOrEmail
fields.label: Phone/GSM/Email
fields.description: Printed as a single blank line covering phone, mobile (GSM), or email, unlike this registry's convention of splitting these into separate fields elsewhere — modelled as one field matching this specimen's own single-line layout, so that the service can contact the applicant about any issues (per the form's own adjacent note).
fields.sourceRef: "Téléphone / GSM / Adresse E-mail:…… (Permet au service de vous contacter en cas d'éventuels problèmes)"

fields.name: additionalDeclarationsOrProxyOrDeliveryAddress
fields.label: Additional Declarations, Power of Attorney, or Delivery Address
fields.sourceRef: Code X10 — "DECLARATIONS COMPLEMENTAIRES EVENTUELLES OU PROCURATION OU ADRESSE DE LIVRAISON"

fields.name: expressDeliveryRequested
fields.label: Express Delivery Requested (Surcharge Applies)
fields.sourceRef: Code X11 — "ACCORD pour LIVRAISON EXPRESS contre SURCOUT (voir verso)"

fields.name: isSpeedPedelec
fields.label: Is a Speed Pedelec
fields.description: Only applicable to moped/e-bike registrations, per this frame's own "CADRE SPECIAL POUR CYCLOMOTEURS" (special frame for mopeds) heading.
fields.sourceRef: Code X15 — "Speedpedelec": ☐ Oui (Vitesse avec assistance jusqu'à 45 km/h) ☐ Non

fields.name: speedPedelecAssistanceType
fields.label: Speed Pedelec Assistance Type
fields.sourceRef: "Si oui": ☐ assistance au pédalage uniquement ☐ assistance au pédalage et moteur autonome

fields.name: plateTypeSpecial
fields.label: Special Plate Type
fields.description: Only completed for the four special vehicle/use categories listed; left blank for an ordinary registration.
fields.sourceRef: Code X16 — "TYPE DE PLAQUE": ☐ Oldtimer (O) ☐ Taxi (TX) ☐ Location avec chauffeur (TL) ☐ Tracteur agricole (G)

fields.name: preferredLanguage
fields.label: Preferred Language of Correspondence
fields.sourceRef: Code X9 — "Indiquer la langue souhaitée": ☐ Français ☐ Nederlands ☐ Deutsch

fields.name: legalEntityDelegateName
fields.label: Legal Entity's Delegate Name (in Capitals)
fields.description: The form's own footnote directs that, for a legal-entity applicant, the signing delegate's name must also be printed in capital letters alongside the signature.
fields.sourceRef: Code X8 footnote — "S'il s'agit d'une personne juridique: le nom du délégué en MAJUSCULES également"
